channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish dumped in alleyway by playground, 22nd March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped in alleyway. Strewn all over the floor as large bag has split, appears to have cat litter etc. appeared a couple of days ago. Big increase of dumped rubbish around Butterfield Green recently.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Approach Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Callcott, 22nd March
item.description:
Some idiot dumped their takeaway litter here. Again, as usual

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buckley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas cannisters, 22nd March
item.description:
Flytipping gas cannisters in gutter in Canada rd near top end of road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canada Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa and clothes, 22nd March
item.description:
Fly tipping
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Larmans Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped and vermin now spreading rubbish, 22nd March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped and vermin now spreading rubbish on Tower Road. It’s near number 7 Tower Road, and near the entrance to Franks Park near the sixth form entrance to trinity school. It’s spilled onto the pavements and is now likely to spread into residential front gardens. Dog walkers go by as do children.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 21 Southampton Row, 22nd March
item.description:
Tripped up damaged pavement and smashed my face/tooth on pavement. Id like to know this has a schedule fix/repair date so it doesn't happen to anyone else. I have 2 witnesses and a paramedic report if needed. I reported before but you just closed it which is disgusting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 122, Southampton Row, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 inch diameter pothole just before narrowing, 22nd March
item.description:
It is damaging suspension Nd getting bigger
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riversdale Road, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 inch pothole on riversdalw road near before turing right for Highbury quadrant coming from blackstok rd, 22nd March
item.description:
Pothole very big damaging suspension and tracking
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Riversdale Road, Finsbury Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 22nd March
item.description:
Same people dumping their rubbish at the tree again, nothing gets done, some one needs to go through the bags to identify who it is and stop them

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Titchfield Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes big and small!, 22nd March
item.description:
Manny potholes in this section of Leigham court road, and also at the top of Leigham court road close to Streatham common park, all of which have been over 3 months and are getting worse
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leigham Court Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kerb stones displaced and large craters present, 22nd March
item.description:
Witnessed a motorcyclist narrowly avoid a protruding kerbstone that had slipped into the roadway in Long Lane, Bexleyheath, kerbstones are loose on a large area of the parking areas in long lane towards the erith road fire station side of long lane opposite the playing field, park. What 3 words location is. Glad.Shunts.City. Large craters have appeared in the laybys which are causing the kerbstones to detach. Please can you send a team out to re-bed them in and to fill craters, potholes with tarmac to help hold them in place.. thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Long Lane, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole by sleeping policeman, 22nd March
item.description:
It is very big and as a cyclist I am worried that I will be injured if my tire were to go through it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fountain Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian button, 21st March
item.description:
Pedestrian wait button not working on cycle/foot path
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woolwich Road, East Greenwich, Greater London

item.title: Light out, 21st March
item.description:
Light out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woolwich Road, East Greenwich, Greater London

item.title: A lot of trash fly tipping at Seavington House Champion Hill., 21st March
item.description:
This area is being polluted as the house is abondened and people used to throw stuff there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dog Kennel Hill, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This swing has been problem for number of mo the, 21st March
item.description:
When Is this gunna get repaired instead of a chain at head height for the children to run into

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lawrence Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A number of abandoned vehicles, 21st March
item.description:
A number of vehicles abandoned. Parked bumper to bumper with parts handing off . Open bonnets with missing engines glam flat tyres and weeds growing around wheels they’ve been there over a year.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alma Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 100 Belsize Road, 21st March
item.description:
When vehicles pass over these areas—particularly at speed—they are forced to bounce, which is now consistently causing noticeable vibration and shaking inside my house. This is becoming increasingly disruptive and concerning, especially in terms of potential impact on the property over time. I would really appreciate an update on whether this issue can be inspected and scheduled for repair, as it does not seem to be improving and may worsen if left unaddressed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98, Belsize Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on the corner, 21st March
item.description:
Sign very helpful there's been less rubbish here lately But some dumped now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 288, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging, 21st March
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Stockwell Green, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
